query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Frizzle', 'To fry something until crisp and curled', 'Critics argued that the plan might frizzle the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frolicsome', 'Given to frolicking, playful', 'Over time, the community learned to frolicsome its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frontal', 'Of, in, or at the front', 'Her frontal became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frontier', 'Lying on the exterior part, bordering', 'Her frontier became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Froward', 'Willfully contrary, not easily managed', 'The essay highlights the froward of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frowzy', 'Dirty and untidy, slovenly', 'The essay highlights the frowzy of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frugal', 'Sparing or economical with money', 'The passage presents a frugal portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fruition', 'The point at which a plan or project is realized', '“After years of hard work, his dream of opening a bakery finally came to fruition.”', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fugacious', 'Fleeting, fading quickly, transient', 'The reviewer described the tone as fugacious, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fulcrum', 'The support about which a lever pivots', 'Scholars noted a striking fulcrum between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fulminate', 'To explode with a loud noise, detonate', 'The author hoped the new policy would fulminate tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fulsome', 'Offensive to good taste, especially as being excessive', 'Her fulsome became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fumigate', 'To disinfect, purify, rid of vermin with the chemical fumes', 'Critics argued that the plan might fumigate the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Functionary', 'A person employed as an official who holds limited authority', 'The essay highlights the functionary of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fundamental', 'Pertaining to the foundation or basis', 'The author hoped the new policy would fundamental tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fungible', 'Being of such nature or kind as to be freely exchangeable', 'Her fungible became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fungous', 'Of or pertaining to a fungus, fungal', 'The author hoped the new policy would fungous tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fungus', 'Any member of the kingdom fungi', 'Her fungus became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Furbish', 'To polish or burnish', 'Over time, the community learned to furbish its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Furlong', 'A unit of distance, equal to 220 yards or 0.2 km', 'Scholars noted a striking furlong between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Furlough', 'A usually temporary layoff from work', 'Scholars noted a striking furlough between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Furrier', 'Comparative form of furry, more furry', 'The essay highlights the furrier of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Furrow', 'To make (a) groove, a cut(s) in (the ground etc )', 'Critics argued that the plan might furrow the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Further', 'To encourage growth', 'Over time, the community learned to further its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Furtherance', 'The act of furthering or helping forward', 'Scholars noted a striking furtherance between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Furtive', 'Taken, done, used, etc , surreptitiously or by stealth', 'The passage presents a furtive portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fuse', 'To melt together, to blend, to mix indistinguishably', 'Over time, the community learned to fuse its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fusible', 'Able to be fused or melted', 'The author hoped the new policy would fusible tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fustian', 'A kind of coarse twilled cotton or cotton and linen stuff', 'The essay highlights the fustian of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Futile', 'Incapable of producing any useful result', 'The passage presents a futile portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Futurist', 'In the style of futurism', 'Her futurist became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gaffe', 'A foolish and embarrassing error, esp one made in public', 'Her gaffe became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gaiety', 'The state of being happy', 'The essay highlights the gaiety of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gaily', 'Merrily, joyfully', 'She spoke gaily, leaving little doubt about her position.', 'adverb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gainsay', 'To deny, dispute, or contradict', 'Her gainsay became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gait', 'A manner of walking, stepping, or running', 'Scholars noted a striking gait between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gallant', 'Brave, valiant', 'Her gallant became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Galleon', 'A large sailing vessel of the 15th to the 17th centuries', 'The essay highlights the galleon of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Galore', 'In abundance', 'The essay highlights the galore of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Galvanic', 'Of or pertaining to galvanism, electric', 'The author hoped the new policy would galvanic tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Galvanism', 'The chemical generation of electricity', 'The essay highlights the galvanism of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Galvanize', 'To shock or excite someone into taking action', '“The speech galvanized the audience into supporting the cause.”', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gambit', 'An opening in chess, in which a minor piece is sacrificed', 'Scholars noted a striking gambit between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gambol', 'To skip about, as in dancing or playing, frolic', 'The essay highlights the gambol of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gamester', 'A person who plays games', 'Her gamester became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gamut', 'A (normally) complete range', 'Scholars noted a striking gamut between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gape', 'To open the mouth wide as in a yawn or surprise', 'Over time, the community learned to gape its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Garble', 'To confuse unintentionally or ignorantly, jumble', 'Scholars noted a striking garble between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gargantuan', 'Of the giant gargantua or his appetite', 'Her gargantuan became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Garish', 'Overly ostentatious, so colourful as to be in bad taste', 'Critics argued that the plan might garish the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
